message:
docs: add hooks-concise-display to community modules (#206)

Adds hooks-concise-display module to the community hooks section.

This module provides cleaner, more condensed terminal output for
Amplifier sessions with features like:
- Condensed tool calls with colorized output
- Compact thinking blocks with line limits
- Unified diff display for file edits
- Minimal token stats format

Repository: https://github.com/obra/amplifier-module-hooks-concise-display

🤖 Generated with [Amplifier](https://github.com/microsoft/amplifier)

Co-authored-by: Amplifier <240397093+microsoft-amplifier@users.noreply.github.com>
